title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.341 - Larry Stewart Secret Santa Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Route 7 in Blue Springs
text:
227.341.  Larry Stewart Secret Santa Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Route 7 in Blue Springs. — The portion of State Route 7 from the south edge of the city limits of a home rule city with more than forty-eight thousand but fewer than forty-nine thousand inhabitants heading south to the intersection of U.S.  Highway 50 shall be designated the "Larry Stewart Secret Santa Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid for by private donation.
(L. 2007 H.B. 56 § 1)
